entry.title: Re: Why the Account assignment category not M and showing E
entry.content:
Pls check the background configuration to compare the difference of two account assignment.

SPRO - Material Management - Purchasing - Account Assignment - Maintain Account Assignment Categories

For Account assignment = M，

it doesn't flag the sales order item as cost- and revenue-carrying.

For Account assignment = E

the sales order item as cost- and revenue-carrying, enter an "E" (settlement via sales order).

entry.title: 按单销售业务------销售退货的E库存转公司普通非限制库存报错：物料在工厂、库位不存在
entry.content:
按单销售业务------销售退货的E库存转公司普通非限制库存报错：物料在工厂、库位中不存在。但实际MMBE中物料在工厂、库位是有库存的。

我需要把带有销售订单20000010的E库存转到普通库存（不带销售订单库存），我使用的移动类型是411E。MMBE中显示物料的销售订单库存数量是1，系统报错。请看附件

entry.title: Infonavit discount /380
entry.content:
Buen dia,

Estoy buscando su consejo sobre un tema de descuentos de infonavit que nos genero la implementacion de la nota  3391864.

Esta nota toca funciona MXSI y aparentamente afecta el concepto /31G de dias base que se utilizan para el descuento de infonavit.

En nuestro particular caso ahora cuando el empleado tiene incapacidad le sigue descontando infonavit, aunque eso no es correcto.

Alguien que esta actualizado y ya implemento esta nota y tiene problemas similares?

Cabe mencionar que en noviembre fuimos pilotos de esta coreccion de nota pero despues recibio otras 7 versiones y cuando implementamos la ultima version en febrero 2024 el calculo empezo a tronar y descontar infonavit en incapacidades.

Vemos que ahora el uso de los conceptos /316, /31G, /318 parece un poco diferente, generando problemas.

Cualquier ayuda o consejo seria muy bienvenido.

Muchas gracias,

Miroslav

entry.title: Re: Personas - hidden tabs still showing in SAPGui but ok...
entry.content: Hi Tamas, just following up regarding this. Hopefully my clarification makes sense. Key issue is that the hidden views are shown to the user when clicking the enter key through the views. Appreciate your help, Robyn

many thanks for the hint. Unfortunately, if I want to put the FMS into the "Project" field, I can´t select the automated refresh based on the Project Code.

Regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Hierarchy with directory issue when sharing with othe...
entry.content:
Hi Tuncay Karaca,

I shared following objects. Do you have any ideas?

Cost Center Dimension association to Text and Hierarchy With Directory

Cost Center Hierarchy With Directory association to Text , Cost Center Hierarchy and Cost Center Group

entry.title: Download transport file from CTMs
entry.content:
How do I download a transport file from CTMs?

Don't see a button in CTMs UI. I also checked API https://api.sap.com/api/TMS_v2, but it does seem to have an option to get the content of transport file as response body.

Due to org policies, we need to keep transport content within an internal repo. 

Thanks.

entry.title: PostgreSQL, Hyperscaler Option Now Available for Customers on BTP@China!
entry.content:
Hyperscaler Option

In July 2019, we witnessed an evolution of the SAP BTP strategy with a strong focus on building differentiating business service capabilities and clear intentions to partner with hyperscale cloud providers like Amazon, Microsoft, AliCloud and GCP for commodity technical services like open-source databases and data stores; where these hyperscalers are already market leaders.

In February 2020, considering customer/partner feedback about challenges with the BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) approach, we announced an update to the backing service strategy, with plans to deliver a comprehensively managed backing services offering：

  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

For more details please check SAP BTP Discovery Center and the service documentation on SAP Help Portal.

  • SAP Discovery Center - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Discovery Center - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

 

PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option is globally available via CPEA and PAYG commercial models, for China is available via subscription commercial model. Now, PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option is available for customers on BTP@China!

Here are the SKUs for the PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option on BTP@China:

Service PlanDescription
PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option, standard computePostgreSQL service for small scale production use cases
PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option, premium computePostgreSQL service for large scale production use cases
PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option, storageStorage for PostgreSQL service
PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option, HA storageHA Storage for PostgreSQL service

 

Compute

  • Standard
    • Defines compute resources in the ratio of 1 CPU Core: 2GB RAM.
    • Provides baseline performance for application workloads.
    • Suitable for development and small scale production use cases.
    • Available in Blocks of 2GB Memory (RAM)
    • Supported block sizes – 1 or 2.
  • Premium
    • Defines compute resources in the ratio of 1 CPU Core: 4GB RAM.
    • Provides high performance for application workloads.
    • Suitable for medium to large scale production use cases.
    • Available in Blocks of 4GB Memory (RAM)
    • Supported block sizes – 1,4,8 or 16.

Storage

  • Storage
    • Defines general-purpose disk storage for PostgreSQL.
    • Used for Single-AZ/non-HA storage use cases.
    • Available in Blocks of 5GB Storage (Disk).
  • HA Storage
    • Defines general-purpose disk storage for PostgreSQL with bandwidth considerations for High Availability (Multi-AZ).
    • Used for Multi-AZ/HA storage use cases.
    • Available in Blocks of 5GB Storage (Disk).

 

Usage

Sizing Suggestion

Constructing a PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option instance requires a combination of Compute and Storage entitlements (compute and storage units).

You cannot create an instance with only compute or storage materials.

There are two types of instance configurations supported.

  • Single node PostgreSQL instance created within an Availability Zone (AZ):
    Price of service = x + y
    • x blocks of compute will be charged – either Standard or Premium
    • y blocks of storage will be charged
  • 2 node PostgreSQL instance with Primary and Secondary nodes distributed between two Availability Zones (AZs):
    Price of service = 2x + z
    • 2x blocks of compute will be charged – either Standard or Premium (x for primary node + x for secondary node)
    • z blocks of HA storage will be charged

Examples:

  • For development and testing: 2 standard (4GB RAM) + 4 storage (20GB)
  • For medium scale production: 4 premium (2 premium * 2 AZ, 16GB RAM) + 45 HA-storage (225GB)

For more details: Sizing

 

Create PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option instance via CF CLI (Cloud Foundry Command Line Interface) with Parameters

After making sure that you have sufficient entitlements quota assigned for your instance, then you can create an instance with CLI. Alternatively, you can create via SAP BTP Cockpit.

cf marketplace -e postgresql-db
cf create-service SERVICE PLAN SERVICE_INSTANCE [-c PARAMETERS_AS_JSON]

For example:

cf create-service postgresql-db standard devtoberfest-database -c '{"memory": 2, "storage": 20, "engine_version": "13", "multi_az": false}'

Which needs the following entitlements: 1 unit of standard plan (1x2GB) + 4 units of storage plan (4x5GB).

 

Retrieve Configurations of Instance If Required Once the Service Instance is Created

cf service <service-instance-name>  //Note the service instance id
cf curl /v2/service_instances/<service-instance-id>/parameters

Sample output: 

{
"memory": 2,
"storage": 20,
"engine_version": "13",
"multi_az": true,
"locale": "en_US",
"postgresql_extensions": [
   "ltree",
   "citext",
   "pg_stat_statements",
   "pgcrypto",
   "fuzzystrmatch",
   "hstore",
   "btree_gist",
   "btree_gin",
   "pg_trgm",
   "uuid-ossp"
]}

 

Use PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option Extension APIs

With backing services extension API, customers will be able to:

  • Create a monitoring admin user for the PostgreSQL instance

    API: /postgresql-db/instances/:id/monitoring-admin, PUT

  • Fetch all the deleted PostgreSQL instances

    API: /postgresql-db/org/:orgId/space/:spaceId/deleted-instances, GET

  • Create a database extension supported by the hyperscaler

    API: /postgresql-db/instances/:id/extensions, PUT/DELETE

For more details: Using the ‘PostgreSQL, hyperscaler option’ Extension APIs

 

Export Data from PostgreSQL Service Instance

cf enable-ssh YOUR-HOST-APP
cf restart YOUR-HOST-APP
cf create-service-key MY-DB EXTERNAL-ACCESS-KEY
cf service-key MY-DB EXTERNAL-ACCESS-KEY
cf ssh -L 63306:<hostname>:<port> YOUR-HOST-APP
psql -d <dbname> -U <username> -p 63306 -h localhost
pg_dump -p 63306 -U <username> <dbname> > /c/dataexport/mydata.sql
psql -p 63306 -U <username> -d <dbname> -c "COPY <tablename> TO stdout DELIMITER ',' CSV HEADER;" > /c/dataexport/<tablename>.csv

For more details: Export Data from PostgreSQL Service Instance

 

Backup and Restore

For PostgreSQL database instances deployed on AWS:

  • Full snapshot/backup of data is taken daily for standard and premium service plan instances.
  • DB transaction logs (WAL logs) are archived continuously to support Point-In-Time Recovery (PITR).
  • Backup retention period is 14 days.

Restore to a specified time:

cf create-service postgresql-db <service_plan> <service_instance_name> -c '{"source_instance_id": < >, "restore_time":< >}'

For more details: Restore for PostgreSQL, Hyperscaler Option

 

Run and Deploy CAP with PostgreSQL

The domain model in CAP (Cloud Application Programming) is crucial for defining domain entities using CDS (Core Data Services), allowing seamless integration with external services or databases. CAP, along with its associated tools, automates the translation of CDS models into database-supported schemas. CAP provides native support for various databases such as SAP HANA (Cloud), PostgreSQL, SQLite, and H2. To learn more about CAP’s database support, please refer to CAP – Database Support.

  • For Java, CAP Java SDK is tested on PostgreSQL 15 and supports most of the CAP features.
  • For Node.js, before we use the CAP-community-provided adapter cds-pg in combination with cds-dbm to consume PostgreSQL adapter. Since cds 7, CAP Node.js has natively supported PostgreSQL by releasing new database services and its implementation @cap-js/postgres. @cap-js/postgres provides the functionalities to translate the incoming requests from CDS model to PostgreSQL during runtime, and analyze the delta between the current state of the database and the current state of the CDS model, deploy the changes to the database, load CSV files, etc.

For more details, please read: Run and Deploy SAP CAP (Node.js or Java) with PostgreSQL on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry.

 

Connect to PostgreSQL in Non-CAP Application

Without CAP, you have to connect to PostgreSQL and manage the database schema by additional effort of coding. Anyway, you can do it in the same way as the BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) approach. You can consume the PostgreSQL instance via app binding and the app runtime environment variable.

For example:

Relevant Sources of Information

  • For more information on PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option service, please check SAP Help Portal.
  • For information on PostgreSQL pricing and commercial options and regions, please check SAP Discovery Center.

entry.title: Change Transport Layer for a Package in BTP
entry.content:
Hello,

We have assigned incorrect transport layer to a package and would like to know if there is a way we can edit the package and change the transport layer in BTP.

Currently we are not able to edit this field.

My workaround was to create a new package with correct transport layer and move all the objects into it but it wouldn't allow it . Its not even allowing me to delete the object from the package. I get the below error. 

Appreciate your suggestions

entry.title: How to perform looping in SAP PaPM cloud based on a condition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to traverse through PRHI table to find out the top most WBS Element for a given WBSE value. The logic is, for the given WBS check whether the 'UP' field WBSE value is blank in PRHI table, if not pick the UP field WBSE value and repeat the same.

The process ends when we find an entry with UP field blank and that will be our topmost node. We are not able to find a way to perform this iteration in PaPM. We had tried iterative view, but that couldn't suffice the requirement.

Could you please suggest a way on how we can perform this?

Regards,

Hanna

entry.title: Why system shows "No Relevant Change Documents Were Found" Under Changes Tab Details.
entry.content:
We are unable to see the values in the Changes Tab for few changes in the Sales Order. 

System shows "No Relevant Change Documents Were Found" Under Changes Tab Details.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Why system shows "No Relevant Change Documents Were F...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

This change/modifications are done in the corresponding documents which are linked to this sales order. Due to that the details are not shown under sales order change tab. 

Kindly check the corresponding documents (Eg: Customer Invoice) and there you will be able to see the change details. 

Thanks & Regards,

Arjun T H

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - User Roles for Packages
entry.content: and also u can refer this blog as well https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/access-policies-restrict-access-to-integration-artifacts-in-sap-integration/ba-p/13578435

entry.title: Best Ecommerce Marketing Agency in the USA
entry.content:
In the ever-evolving landscape of online business, selecting the right Ecommerce Marketing Agency can be the key differentiator between soaring success and stagnation. As the digital marketplace becomes increasingly competitive, businesses in the USA are seeking the expertise of specialized agencies to navigate the complexities of Ecommerce marketing. In this article, we delve into the criteria that define the best Ecommerce Marketing Agency in the USA, highlighting the essential features and key considerations to help you make an informed decision.

  1. Strategic Expertise:

The best Ecommerce Marketing Agency in the USA is distinguished by its strategic prowess. It should have a deep understanding of market trends, consumer behavior, and industry-specific nuances. A top-tier agency will work collaboratively with your business to create a tailored marketing strategy that aligns with your goals and effectively targets your audience.

  1. Proven Track Record:

Success leaves a trail, and the best Ecommerce Marketing Agency will have a compelling track record of delivering results. Look for agencies with a portfolio of successful Ecommerce campaigns, client testimonials, and case studies. This evidence showcases their ability to generate tangible outcomes, such as increased website traffic, higher conversion rates, and improved return on investment (ROI).

  1. Multi-Channel Marketing:

A comprehensive Ecommerce marketing strategy extends beyond a single channel. The best agencies understand the significance of a multi-channel approach, incorporating social media, email marketing, content marketing, search engine optimization (SEO), and paid advertising. This diversified strategy ensures maximum reach and engagement with your target audience across various online platforms.

  1. Data-Driven Decision Making:

In the digital age, data is king. The best Ecommerce Marketing Agency utilizes data analytics to inform and optimize their strategies continually. By tracking and analyzing key performance indicators (KPIs), such as website traffic, conversion rates, and customer behavior, they can adapt their approach to maximize results and capitalize on emerging opportunities.

  1. Cutting-Edge Technology:

In a rapidly evolving digital landscape, staying ahead requires leveraging the latest technologies and tools. The best Ecommerce Marketing Agency in the USA employs cutting-edge solutions to enhance campaign performance, streamline processes, and stay ahead of industry trends. From advanced analytics tools to AI-powered marketing automation, technological innovation is a hallmark of the top agencies.

  1. Transparent Communication and Reporting:

Open and transparent communication is paramount in a successful client-agency relationship. The best Ecommerce Marketing Agency keeps clients informed through regular updates, detailed reporting, and clear communication channels. Transparency builds trust and ensures that both parties are on the same page regarding campaign performance and strategic decisions.

Thanks

Alex

entry.title: Re: Livestream of Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum
entry.content:
Yes, Kasten, we will post the links shortly.

Thank you for your interest and support.

entry.title: How SAP consultants can show productivity measurements for client work
entry.content:
Recently, a SAP consulting firm approached us, presenting a challenge that we've since learned is quite prevalent within the industry. It's likely that if you work as a SAP consultant, you might be familiar with this issue as well.

This particular consultancy, located in India, was eager to assess the productivity levels of their team. While this in itself wasn't out of the ordinary, the twist was their desire to track productivity exclusively during the times their consultants were engaged in client-related activities.

On an average day, their consultants dedicate about half of their eight-hour workday to client projects and the remaining half to internal assignments. The company places a high value on productivity, especially wanting to gauge it during client-focused tasks rather than the overall time spent on the SAP application throughout the day.

Previously, the consultancy had been using a single SAP Windows application for accessing various client systems, which proved to be suboptimal and lacked the detailed productivity insights they sought.

Our productivity monitoring tool, Intelogos, typically tracks the usage of websites and applications. However, this situation demanded a more refined approach to differentiate between client-related and internal SAP application use.

Upon receiving their request, we developed a unique feature tailored to SAP consultancies that allows for the detailed segmentation and analysis of productivity data for both client and internal tasks.

This innovation now enables the consultancy to precisely evaluate the productivity and efficiency of the services they provide to clients for the first time, leading to improved ROI, better resource management, and most crucially, enhanced client satisfaction.

Interestingly, this consultancy is not alone in its needs. Since introducing this SAP-specific capability, we've had inquiries from other firms seeking similar solutions. Consequently, we've made this feature accessible to all SAP consulting firms.

entry.title: SAP Easy Access - Menu Text missing
entry.content:
Users are unable to identfiy the transaction to be used as the text display on the easy menu when missing.

Not only its affecting the easy menu, ALV report and any menu disply in tree structure are affected too.

Anyone having such issue. BTW, I'm using SAP ECC 6 EHP6. SAP Logon Pad 800

entry.title: SAP CAPM Hybrid Testing - 404 not found error while calling Backend OData services
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are trying to set up local debugging for the existing CAPM full stack application which was already deployed on BTP Cloud Foundry. We have generated .CDSRC.PRIVATE.JSON file using CDS BIND command for all the services including destination service. We have upgraded CDS package from 5*  to 

 "@sap/cds": "^7.2.1" as CDS BIND command doesn't work in the lower version.  We are using 2 OData-v2 services in UI as below
 
1) CAPM Service - OData V2 -Server.js - get Call ends with 404 Not found
const proxy = require('@sap/cds-odata-v2-adapter-proxy');
const cds = require('@sap/cds');
module.exports = cds.server;

cds.on('bootstrap', (app) => {
    app.use(proxy({
        isoDate: true
    }))
});
2) CPI Service - OData V2. - get Call ends with 404 Not found
 
http://localhost:56738/gw/odata/SAP/GETDATA;v=1/$metadata?sap-language=EN 
 
Below is the screenshot of services in Manifest..json file
 

 

 
This application is running successfully on BTP currently. UI is loading successfully but not able to connect to back end services in Manifest while we set up for Hybrid testing. Would any one please point me the issue ? Thanks.

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2024.04 版新功能抢先看
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能 (BI)、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.04 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期 (QRC) 客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024 年第2季度版本的一部分提供。这里可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。

 

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本 1.0.397，利用所有数据采集类型。


除以下情况外，您的代理需要1.0.75或以上版本：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库版本1.0.99
  • SAP Universe (UNX)版本1.0.365（ SAP分析云代理需要额外的设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse (BW)版本1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View版本1.0.235
  • File Server版本1.0.248

更多详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关将 SAP BW 与 SAP 分析云集成的受支持功能和所需更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2541557 以了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 与 SAP 分析云来实时访问 Universe 时的受支持功能和所需更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921 以了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的“简易部署工具箱”。

  • 为避免下载旧版本并可能让用户面对 Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的绑定不当带来的漏洞，只有三个最新版本可供下载。

关于云代理的版本变更管理细节，请参考 SAP Note 3264839。
 

更新亮点

  • 企业计划
    • 多步操作 – 在多步操作参数中支持分析模型  | （SAP 路线图浏览器）
  • 故事拓展性
    • 综合增强：支持响应式布局  | （SAP 路线图浏览器）

 

企业计划

在多步操作参数中支持分析模型

用户现在可以将分析模型应用于多步操作参数，并且可以在数据操作步骤和 API 步骤中使用这些参数。这些参数也可以在故事运行时动态使用。(SAP路线图浏览器)￼

 

 



 

 

故事拓展性

组合增强：支持响应式布局

在优化故事体验的响应式页面中，故事设计者们现在可以使用组合了。这是作为第二季度版本更新中更大的组合增强的一部分。(SAP路线图浏览器)

阅读由@jie_deng 撰写的博客文章，了解有关组合的更多信息。

 


本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和增强功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP知识库文章。

entry.title: Re: I've got problems with CPILint , I need HELP !!
entry.content:
Hey @ag3silaus,

Thanks for your message! I've already reached out to @MortenWittrock, and I can't thank him enough for his invaluable help in sorting out the issue. it turned out that the solution lay in copying the hostname directly from the URL of the service key, rather than grabbing it from the browser.

Thanks again for your support! 🙂

Best regards,

MellonMellow

entry.content: We have a business requirement to update the Journal Entry using any BAPI; I know we have BAPI to post Journal Entry but not able to find for change. how to achieve an update of Journal Entry remotely(other than APIs)?

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...
entry.content: Thank you Jerry for the clarification. Do you know, how to get those details of custom CDS Views programmatically (any API ?) On another post I was looking for some information, how to get the TADIR entry for any object in public cloud. I saw one CDS View, which seems to be not addressing all objects. Basically we get one object name, we are not able to determine whether that is CDS View or Table. So we want to find the type of that object. Any suggestions on this ? Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: How to activate the material ledger in S/4 Hana Publi...
entry.content: Hi Romzi, Yes, you need to activate 33Q.

entry.title: Intercompany Project Sales Order is with Preparation
entry.content:
Intercompany Project Sales Order got created from purchase order, but the sales order status is with In Preparation and project task not created. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Project Sales Order is with Preparation
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The Project Based Sales Order is not released automatically, since the system is not able to create a Project to the scenario.
This happens because the Organization Unit being used in the scenario is not marked a viable/valid Cost Center.

You can refer to the "KBA 3011011 - Project Based Intercompany Sales Order is not Released Automatically"

Thanks & Regards,

Arjun T H

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: 基于投资项目生成的在建工程固定资产科目
entry.content:
客户您好，

通过投资项目，系统自动生成的在建工程固定资产的资产类别是4001.

这个是系统预定义好的，无法进行更改。

很抱歉为您造成的不便。

Best Regards,

Evelyn

entry.title: Re: Need to create a SLD bridge between Systems to LAMA t...
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days.  You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: SAP CAPM Hybrid Testing - 404 not found error while calling Backend OData services
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are trying to set up local debugging for the existing CAPM full stack application which was already deployed on BTP Cloud Foundry. We have generated .CDSRC.PRIVATE.JSON file using CDS BIND command for all the services including destination service. We have upgraded CDS package from 5*  to 

 "@sap/cds": "^7.2.1" as CDS BIND command doesn't work in the lower version.  We are using 2 OData-v2 services in UI as below
 
1) CAPM Service - OData V2 -Server.js - get Call ends with 404 Not found
const proxy = require('@sap/cds-odata-v2-adapter-proxy');
const cds = require('@sap/cds');
module.exports = cds.server;

cds.on('bootstrap', (app) => {
    app.use(proxy({
        isoDate: true
    }))
});
2) CPI Service - OData V2. - get Call ends with 404 Not found
 
http://localhost:56738/gw/odata/SAP/GETDATA;v=1/$metadata?sap-language=EN 
 
Below is the screenshot of services in Manifest..json file
 

 

 

 
This application is running successfully on BTP currently. UI is loading successfully but not able to connect to back end services in Manifest while we set up for Hybrid testing. Would any one please point me the issue ? Thanks.

entry.title: Is DKIM key different for each tenant and domains
entry.content:
User want to activate DKIM for Business email and they want to know if DKIM key generated by SAP is different for each tenant and domain


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is DKIM key different for each tenant and domains
entry.content: DKIM key is generated with respect to customer and not for each tenant or domains so DKIM will be common for all the domains irrespective of tenants.

entry.title: Re: Posting acquisitions on OIM account
entry.content:
Dear Kamil,

You can post this via 2-step approach.

1. Post the asset acquisition directly in AA to offsetting account.

2. you can repost or distribute costs with full account assignment in Post Journal Entries app. 

Have a nice day.

Best Regards,

Evelyn

entry.title: Re: Item Price from last two AP Invoice
entry.content:
Hello Samudra, involve your SD & MM consultant, drawback of this option each PO item should be linked to SO item or you have to generate PO based on SO which might not be applicable in your scenerio.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Wrong image in repeated containers (SEVERAL BUG)
entry.content:
The icon for each team (?) is what you are saying is a container background?
I assume the matches (?) are repeated, but are the teams in each match also repeated?
Is the API and the project something you can share?
You're saying the exact app was working a month ago and now not?

entry.title: Configuration of standard SAP Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hello Sap Guru's,

Is there any option to configure SAP standard SAP Fiori Apps from functional and technical point of view.

Example:- If we want to do any kind of enhancements on standard SAP fiori apps (web dynpro).

 

Regards

Deepak Doddaogoudar

entry.title: Re: Feature request and bug report
entry.content: Do you have a link to current platform for reporting bugs?

entry.title: BTP@China环境上的PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, Hyperscaler Option可面向客户提供！
entry.content:
Hyperscaler Option

2019年7月，我们目睹了SAP BTP战略的演进，强调构建具有差异化业务服务能力，并明确表示打算与超大规模云提供商合作，如Amazon、Microsoft,、AliCloud和GCP，提供开源数据库和数据存储等通用技术服务；而这些超大规模云提供商已经是市场领导者。

2020年2月，考虑到客户/合作伙伴关于BYOA（自带账户）方法面临的挑战的反馈，我们宣布了一项更新来调整支持服务策略，计划提供全面托管的支持服务：

  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

更多详细信息，请阅读SAP BTP Discovery Center和服务文档SAP Help Portal：

  • SAP Discovery Center - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Discovery Center - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

 

PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

在全球，PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option 是通过CPEA和PAYG的商业模式来为客户提供服务。在中国，则是通过Subscription 的订阅方式。无论如何，现在BTP中国环境上的PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option服务已可面向客户提供！

以下是中国BTP上 PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option 的物料 (SKUs)：

服务计划描述
PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option, 标准计算（standard compute ）适用于小规模生产使用的PostgreSQL服务
PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option，高级计算（premium compute）适用于大规模生产使用的PostgreSQL服务
PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option，存储（storage）PostgreSQL服务的存储
PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option，高可用存储（HA storage）PostgreSQL服务的高可用存储

计算

  • 标准计算（standard compute）
    • 以1个CPU核心: 2GB内存的比例定义计算资源。
    • 为应用工作负载提供基准性能。
    • 适用于开发和小规模生产场景。
    • 可以按2GB内存（RAM）的块大小使用。
    • 支持的块大小为1或2。
  • 高级计算（premium compute）
    • 以1个CPU核心: 4GB内存的比例定义计算资源。
    • 为应用工作负载提供高性能。
    • 适用于中型到大型生产场景。
    • 可以按4GB内存（RAM）的块大小使用。
    • 支持的块大小为1、4、8或16。

存储

  • 存储（storage）
    • 为PostgreSQL定义通用磁盘存储。
    • 用于单可用区（非高可用）存储场景。
    • 可以按5GB存储（磁盘）的块大小使用。
  • 高可用存储（HA storage）
    • 为具有高可用性（多可用区）的PostgreSQL定义通用磁盘存储，并考虑带宽。
    • 用于多可用区（高可用）存储场景。
    • 可以按5GB存储（磁盘）的块大小使用。

 

使用 PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option 服务

资源 Sizing 建议

构建一个PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option实例需要结合计算和存储的资源分配。

您不能单独使用计算或存储资源创建实例。

服务实例支持两种配置模式：

  • 在可用区（AZ）内创建的单节点PostgreSQL实例：
    服务价格 = x + y
    • 将收取x个计算块 - 可以是标准或高级
    • 将收取y个存储块
  • 具有主节点和从节点分布在两个可用区（AZ）之间的2节点PostgreSQL实例：
    服务价格 = 2x + z
    • 将收取2x个计算块 - 可以是标准或高级（x个用于主节点 + x个用于从节点）
    • 将收取z个HA存储块

示例：

  • 用于开发和测试：2个标准（4GB RAM）+ 4个存储（20GB）
  • 用于中等规模生产：4个高级（2个高级 * 2个AZ，16GB RAM）+ 45个HA存储（225GB）

更多详情请参阅：资源 Sizing

 

利用参数创建 PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option 实例

确保您的实例有足够的配额分配后，您可以使用CF CLI或Cockpit创建实例。

以下是CF CLI的方式：

cf marketplace -e postgresql-db
cf create-service SERVICE PLAN SERVICE_INSTANCE [-c PARAMETERS_AS_JSON]

例如：

cf create-service postgresql-db standard devtoberfest-database -c '{"memory": 2, "storage": 20, "engine_version": "13", "multi_az": false}'

这需要以下资源分配：1个标准计算（standard compute，1x2GB ） + 4个存储单元（storage，4x5GB）的资源配额。

 

查看服务实例配置

cf service <service-instance-name>  //Note the service instance id
cf curl /v2/service_instances/<service-instance-id>/parameters

示例输出结果：

{
"memory": 2,
"storage": 20,
"engine_version": "13",
"multi_az": true,
"locale": "en_US",
"postgresql_extensions": [
   "ltree",
   "citext",
   "pg_stat_statements",
   "pgcrypto",
   "fuzzystrmatch",
   "hstore",
   "btree_gist",
   "btree_gin",
   "pg_trgm",
   "uuid-ossp"
]}

 

使用 PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option 拓展API

通过支持服务扩展 API，客户将能够：

  • 为 PostgreSQL 实例创建监控管理员用户

    API：/postgresql-db/instances/:id/monitoring-admin，PUT

  • 获取所有已删除的 PostgreSQL 实例

    API：/postgresql-db/org/:orgId/space/:spaceId/deleted-instances，GET

  • 创建由超级扩展支持的数据库扩展

    API：/postgresql-db/instances/:id/extensions，PUT/DELETE

更多详细信息，请访问：使用 PostgreSQL，Hyperscaler Option 扩展API

 

从PostgreSQL服务实例中导出数据

cf enable-ssh YOUR-HOST-APP
cf create-service-key MY-DB EXTERNAL-ACCESS-KEY
cf service-key MY-DB EXTERNAL-ACCESS-KEY
cf ssh -L 63306:<hostname>:<port> YOUR-HOST-APP
psql -d <dbname> -U <username> -p 63306 -h localhost
pg_dump -p 63306 -U <username> <dbname> > /c/dataexport/mydata.sql
psql -p 63306 -U <username> -d <dbname> -c "COPY <tablename> TO stdout DELIMITER ',' CSV HEADER;" > /c/dataexport/<tablename>.csv

更多详细信息，请访问：从PostgreSQL服务实例中导出数据。

 

备份和恢复

对于AWS上的PostgreSQL数据库实例：

  • 标准和高级服务计划实例每天都会进行完整的快照/备份数据。
  • 数据库事务日志（WAL日志）会持续地存档，以支持时点恢复（PITR）。
  • 备份保留期为14天。

恢复到指定时间：

cf create-service postgresql-db <service_plan> <service_instance_name> -c '{"source_instance_id": < >, "restore_time":< >}'

了解更多详细信息，请访问：PostgreSQL，hyperscaler option的恢复

 

运行和部署CAP应用并消费PostgreSQL

CAP 及其相关工具可自动将 CDS 模型转换为数据库支持的模式。 CAP 为 SAP HANA（云）、PostgreSQL、SQLite 和 H2 等各种数据库提供了原生支持。 要了解有关 CAP 数据库支持的更多信息，请查看：CAP – 数据库支持。

  • 对于 Java，CAP Java SDK 在 PostgreSQL 15 上进行了测试，并支持大多数 CAP 功能。
  • 对于 Node.js，在cds 7之前，我们使用CAP 社区提供的适配器 cds-pg 并与 cds-dbm 结合来消费PostgreSQL。 自 cds 7 起，CAP Node.js 将通过新的数据库服务及其实现 @cap-js/postgres 来原生支持 PostgreSQL。 利用@cap-js/postgres 可在运行时将来自 CDS 模型的请求转换为 PostgreSQL，还可以分析数据库当前状态与 CDS 模型当前状态之间的差异，将更改部署到数据库，加载 CSV 文件等。

了解更多详细信息，请访问：在 SAP BTP Cloud Foundry 上使用 PostgreSQL 运行和部署 SAP CAP（Node.js 或 Java）。

 

在非CAP应用程序中消费PostgreSQL

在没有CAP的情况下，您需要通过额外编写代码来连接PostgreSQL并管理数据库Schema。具体来说，您可以按照BYOA（自带账户）方法进行。您可以通过应用绑定和应用运行时环境变量来获得PostgreSQL实例的详细信息。

例如：

相关信息来源

  • 有关SAP BTP上的PostgreSQL超级扩展选项服务的更多信息，请查看SAP Help Portal。
  • 有关PostgreSQL定价、商业选项和区域的信息，请查看SAP Discovery Center。

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC to SAP BW data transfer
entry.content: Thanks a lot. this helped

entry.title: Re: BODS:Parallel Execution of Same Dataflow with differe...
entry.content:

Please provide me exact answers.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - How to create a hierarchy in the model in the updated version.
entry.content:
I have created an import model from SF to SAC using the new model type.

In this model,  I have assigned a description column to the respective ID field.

Now, I have to create a hierarchy (Company -> Business unit -> Department -> Sector). Like the old version, I am not able to create a hierarchy. How to create the hierarchy?

entry.title: Re: SAP authorization check for tables in Se16, se16n, se...
entry.content:
Dear Sandra,

Thanks a lot for your reply. I'll use range option.

Best regars,

Tamuna

entry.title: Creating Dimension Filter Using Dropdown
entry.content:
Hi, I am attempting to set the filter of a singular dimension (G/L Account) using a dropdown in SAC. Although, when I attempt to set the dimension filter it removes all the dimensions from my table and I am not sure as to why it is. I have attached images below regarding the results and my code. I assume it has to do with the book/unbooked functionality although I am not sure. I currently have all my dimensions set to Unbooked but still can not get the table to be filtered.  In the images below you can see the dropdown is set to unassigned and the filter receives it but does not display it in the table. 

 

Any help at all would be greatly appreciated!

Kind regards, Ammar

entry.title: Mass Update app in SAP IAG
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

While accessing Mass update application in SAP IAG, selected entity type as Business role --> Launch guided process, it throws an error as shown in the screen shot. 

I have IAG_MASSUPDATE role mapped to a role collection and assigned to my ID. Any other role to be assigned? Please help. Thank you. 

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: 0WM_WO delta Data Source pulling data only once in a day
entry.content:
Hello ,

I have issues with 0WM_WO data sources, normally in my land scape it will run 3 times day but it is  pulling delta data only once in day .

Can any one give some suggestions on this.

we are using S4 and B4 Applications.

Thanks,

Nischal.

entry.title: SAP ITSM auto assign message processor
entry.content:
Currently Incidents are assigning to support team directly using partner determination procedure (brfplus rules).
But could you help to know, can we directly assign to any specific message processor ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP ITSM auto assign message processor
entry.content:
Dear customer,

The support team determination is for support team instead of individual processor, as long as you have defined the BRF+ rules for the determination, it will auto fill the support team based on your configuration.

Below document and KBA for your reference:

KBA: ##2464175

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sm/3518047800.html

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: After creating a Sales Order Draft via DI API system shows unexpected Discounts
entry.content: Two questions: 1. what happens between the draft and the real order? 2. You showed the correct prices ans discounts for two rows. What were the wrong values for these rows?

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Control Tower Tiles are not loading
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP Build Process Automation control tower tiles are not loading cause of this I'm unable to register any new agent to the environment, Trigger adding and etc.. I checked in various browsers and various systems as well still the issue is persist. Kindly guide us to resolve this issue. Adding screenshot for your reference.

Thanks,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation #Tile Loading issue #Agent register

entry.title: Re: Why the Account assignment category not M and showing E
entry.content:
Hello Sarath, Check related sales order requirement type & requirement class (OVGH) - it seems whatever mapped in requirement class getting copied to PR.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Provisioning of Overdue receivables using Value adjustment key in SAP S/4 HANA 1909
entry.content: Clear Content

entry.title: SAP Intelligent RPA - API trigger failed when sending the big request
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm developing an automation in SPA.

When I send a normal request to API Trigger. The Automation is working successfully.

However, when I try with a big request (big body), the automation returns the below error.

Could you help to figure out what is the problem and how to solve it?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP BTP setup with Terraform - Infrastructure as Code for Cloud Foundry and Kyma Envi
entry.content:
Hi @ikenna-okeke, Thank you for your reply.

But I just wanted to create a service instance in a subaccount which is present in btp_subaccount resources. And the basic requirements for creating a subaccount service instance is given below: 

 

# create an instance of the alert-notification service (no configuration necessary)
resource "btp_subaccount_service_instance" "alert_notification_free" {
  subaccount_id = "6aa64c2f-38c1-49a9-b2e8-cf9fea769b7f"
  # The service plan ID can be looked up via the data source btp_subaccount_service_plan
  serviceplan_id = "b50d1b0b-2059-4f21-a014-2ea87752eb48" # alert-notification - free
  name           = "my-alert-notification-instance-new"
}

 

Reference: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/subaccount_service_instance 

I want to access the serviceplan_id using the data sources command for by_name as mentioned in the documentation of terraform for btp provider.

 

# look up a sercvice plan by plan name and offering name and subaccount ID
data "btp_subaccount_service_plan" "by_name" {
  subaccount_id = "6aa64c2f-38c1-49a9-b2e8-cf9fea769b7f"
  name          = "free"
  offering_name = "alert-notification"
}

 

Reference: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/data-sources/subaccount_service_plan

But I'm unable to get the serviceplan_id.

entry.title: Re: Receive supplier invoices from authorities' platform and send them to different automation solut
entry.content: Thanks Sujeet for coming up with this 🙂

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP BTP setup with Terraform - Infrastructure as Code for Cloud Foundry and Kyma Envi
entry.content:
Hey @kailashnamata  that is because you are doing something wrong. getting the service_plan sometimes can be difficult at times, so what you have to do is get it this way,

 

data "btp_subaccount_service_plan" "alert-notification" {
subaccount_id = "6aa64c2f-38c1-49a9-b2e8-cf9fea769b7f"
name = "standard"
offering_name = "alert-notification"
}, create the service instance now using 


resource "btp_subaccount_service_instance" "alert_notification" {
subaccount_id = "6aa64c2f-38c1-49a9-b2e8-cf9fea769b7f"
# The service plan ID can be looked up via the data source btp_subaccount_service_plan
serviceplan_id =btp_subaccount_service_plan.alert-notification.id
name = "my-alert-notification-instance-new"
},
to get the name of the service plan, use the cockpit>entitlement> and under plan, you'll see the alert notification does not have a plan for "free", only has "standard".   before this make sure you  already have the alert notification entitlement on the subaccount
Hope this helps, CIAO.

entry.title: Hana Cloud Database Integration with SAP Cloud Integration via JDBC part -1
entry.content:
As SAP has provided over 100+ services to work on the business scenarios, I have just came up with and interesting requirements where we need to provide the API’s from integration suite which will be connected with the backend as Hana Cloud database to store some data. And based on some requirements we need to do some little bit computation in integration suite.

In this Blog, I will be doing the step-by-step procedure to connect with the Hana cloud database and the formats/available method to push and pull the data from Hana cloud database.

Prerequisites for this Integration

  • Integration suite must be provisioned.
  • Hana Cloud database must be provisioned

SAP Cockpit Instance and subscription page

 

Requirement Architecture

Architecture for this Integration

 

Steps required to connect with Hana cloud database:

  1. Get the SQL endpoint from Hana Cloud database.
  2. SQL endpoint needs to be configured in JDBC material for Connection.
  3. JDBC connection via JDBC Adapter.

Get the SQL endpoint from Hana Cloud Database

Open SAP Hana Cloud, you will be redirected to the All instance tab where database link will be visible.

Hana Cloud Database Instance Page

 

On the right hand side multiple tabs will be visible, from where copy the  SQL endpoint from Connection tab.

SAP Hana Cloud Database Overview

 

Example for SQL endpoint: <instanceID>. hana.prod-in30.hanacloud.ondemand.com:443

Connection URL: jdbc:sap://<server>:<port>[/?<options>]

 

SQL endpoint needs to be configured in JDBC material for Connection

Go to your integration suite tenant and click on JDBC material under Manage security section.

SAP Cloud Integration Monitoring Page

 

Here under JDBC data source, you need to add one JDBC data source i.e. nothing just a connection string in general term, and fill all the required data.

NameJDBC Data source name
DescriptionGeneral description
Database TypeSelect “SAP Hana Cloud” from drop down
User/PasswordDatabase username and Password
JDBC URLPaste the SQL endpoint which is copied from the Hana Cloud database

The JDBC URL required a little modification, which will be like

“jdbc:sap:// <instanceID>. hana.prod-in30.hanacloud.ondemand.com:443/?encrypt=true”

Here the thing to be noted is when we generally create and database connection string we put database name as well, but in case of SAP Hana cloud database, we are getting the SQL endpoint from the database itself which are located under instance. That is reason database name is not required.

Also, in case of 3rd party database such as Microsoft SQL Server, Oracle and DB2 you need to upload the JDBC driver jar file under JDBC driver tab. In case of HANA it is not required.

JDBC Driver upload

 

JDBC connection via JDBC Adapter

While designing the IFlow using JDBC adapter, you can create the connection with database using jdbc data source. Below are the configuration for the adapter.

JDBC Adapter Configuration

 

Here the configuration is normal apart from Batch mode. Batch mode provides functionality to modify multiple records in a single payload. Where the subsequent options Atomic and Non-Atomic.

  • Atomic: enabling this option will execute each batch and revert successful only in case when all the batches are successfully executed. In case of failure in any of the batch it reverts the transaction back to initial stage.
  • Non-Atomic: It depends on the behaviour of the database, and it does not revert the transaction back to its initial stage.

 

In the next series of this blog post, I will be providing the examples on how to push and pull the data from the database by using standard xml method and with SQL query.

Hana Cloud Database Integration with SAP Cloud Integration via JDBC part – 2.

It would be great if you provide any feedback or improvement points for upcoming content.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Substance Volume Tracking - Production Scenario and BOM
entry.content: Hi Christoph, That was a very well explanation easy to get an overall idea. Thanks! One question though, is it necessary to use BOM-BOS to build the composition? This is because Our legal composition has similar components (Pure subs) that are assigned to the BOM components with corresponding real substance.

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content: @Ethan_Dai  In the SF Admin Centre, the user mapping for whoever is setting up the connection has to be successful (the admin user). Once successful, go to the Teams App, and the end users using the app may partially succeed or fail depending on if they have a valid user on both sides. The App will work for those who are successfully mapped.

entry.title: Re: Display distinct data from table for value help in CAPM
entry.content:
I would suggest creating a separate view for Value Help using your main entity in srv folder directly. And bind that newly created View for value help


Example :

//MATERIAL MASTER - Main Entity Containing Batch
//PRICECONDSET - Value Help For Unique Batch

define view VH_PRICECONDSET as
    select from MATERIAL_MASTER distinct {
        key BATCH_NUMBER               
    } where BATCH_NUMBER !='';

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP BTP setup with Terraform - Infrastructure as Code for Cloud Foundry and Kyma Envi
entry.content: Thank you so much @ikenna-okeke. I'll try this.

entry.title: Re: Database getting smashed by particular query - OILM/O...
entry.content:
I have solved this bottle neck. Actually it is related to the query and SQL optimizer setting a bad / parallel plan depending on the servers MAXDOP and parallelism settings. I created a plan guide and confirmed via the query store metrics that indeed we have a winner with massively reduced min, avg and max durations.

EXEC sp_create_plan_guide
@name = N'Slow SAP Parallel Fix', 
@stmt = N'SELECT T0.[DocLineNum], T2.[SysNumber], T0.[ActionType], T1.[BinAbs], T1.[Quantity] FROM  [dbo].[OILM] T0  INNER  JOIN [dbo].[OBTL] T1  ON  T0.[MessageID] = T1.[MessageID]    LEFT OUTER  JOIN [dbo].[ILM1] T2  ON  T1.[MessageID] = T2.[MessageID]  AND  T1.[SnBMDAbs] = T2.[MdAbsEntry]   WHERE T0.[TransType] = (@P1)  AND  T0.[DocEntry] = (@P2)   ORDER BY T0.[DocLineNum],T1.[SnBMDAbs],T1.[BinAbs]',
@type = N'SQL',
@module_or_batch = N'SELECT T0.[DocLineNum], T2.[SysNumber], T0.[ActionType], T1.[BinAbs], T1.[Quantity] FROM  [dbo].[OILM] T0  INNER  JOIN [dbo].[OBTL] T1  ON  T0.[MessageID] = T1.[MessageID]    LEFT OUTER  JOIN [dbo].[ILM1] T2  ON  T1.[MessageID] = T2.[MessageID]  AND  T1.[SnBMDAbs] = T2.[MdAbsEntry]   WHERE T0.[TransType] = (@P1)  AND  T0.[DocEntry] = (@P2)   ORDER BY T0.[DocLineNum],T1.[SnBMDAbs],T1.[BinAbs]',
@params = '@P1 int,@P2 int',
@hints = N'OPTION (MAXDOP 1)'

entry.title: Re: Database getting smashed by particular query - OILM/O...
entry.content:
I have solved this bottle neck. Actually it is related to the query and SQL optimizer setting a bad / parallel plan depending on the servers MAXDOP and parallelism settings. I created a plan guide and confirmed via the query store metrics that indeed we have a winner with massively reduced min, avg and max durations.

EXEC sp_create_plan_guide
@name = N'Slow SAP Parallel Fix', 
@stmt = N'SELECT T0.[DocLineNum], T2.[SysNumber], T0.[ActionType], T1.[BinAbs], T1.[Quantity] FROM  [dbo].[OILM] T0  INNER  JOIN [dbo].[OBTL] T1  ON  T0.[MessageID] = T1.[MessageID]    LEFT OUTER  JOIN [dbo].[ILM1] T2  ON  T1.[MessageID] = T2.[MessageID]  AND  T1.[SnBMDAbs] = T2.[MdAbsEntry]   WHERE T0.[TransType] = (@P1)  AND  T0.[DocEntry] = (@P2)   ORDER BY T0.[DocLineNum],T1.[SnBMDAbs],T1.[BinAbs]',
@type = N'SQL',
@module_or_batch = N'SELECT T0.[DocLineNum], T2.[SysNumber], T0.[ActionType], T1.[BinAbs], T1.[Quantity] FROM  [dbo].[OILM] T0  INNER  JOIN [dbo].[OBTL] T1  ON  T0.[MessageID] = T1.[MessageID]    LEFT OUTER  JOIN [dbo].[ILM1] T2  ON  T1.[MessageID] = T2.[MessageID]  AND  T1.[SnBMDAbs] = T2.[MdAbsEntry]   WHERE T0.[TransType] = (@P1)  AND  T0.[DocEntry] = (@P2)   ORDER BY T0.[DocLineNum],T1.[SnBMDAbs],T1.[BinAbs]',
@params = '@P1 int,@P2 int',
@hints = N'OPTION (MAXDOP 1)'

entry.title: Currency to be removed from column (SAC Live Data Model)
entry.content: I am trying to remove INR and Nos from the SAC Live Data Model, but I am not able to find the option to hide it. How can we hide it from the report?

entry.title: Re: Staging bay not assigned to ODO or WT when door assig...
entry.content:
Yes, the bins on each staging area are created.

3 bins per staging area, left. right and center.

entry.title: Re: How can I connect my HDI Container of my SAP Hana Clo...
entry.content:
Hello, my understanding is that you already tried to connect from power bi to hana cld and it worked you just got insufficient privileges, right?
If yes , then the way i solved this issue, you have to create a hdbrole in your project which would have sufficient privileges on that hdi. Then login in database cockpit with dbadmin and assign that role to the user which you're using for connection. 
Normally i would assume it solves your issue.

entry.title: What's up with OpenSAP (Downtime?)
entry.content:
Hey all,

does anybody know what's currently going on at openSAP. I can't access the site any longer since this morning. Was there a scheduled maintenance?

Best.
Sebastian

entry.title: BEx Query Boolean operator syntax
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Greetings,

I need a help in BEx Query Boolean operator syntax.

My requirement as below

Condition 1

Quot. qty = 100

Sales. Qty = 100

Invoice. Qty = 100.

If above all values equal, then I want to display the STATUS as "Completed or 1"

Condition 2

Quot. Qty = 0

Sales. Qty = 100

Invoice. Qty = 100.

then I want to display the STATUS as "Not Completed or 0"

 

Condition 3

Quot. qty = 100

Sales. Qty = 90

Invoice. Qty = 80.

Then I want to display the status as " Not Completed or 0"

 

Condition 4

Quot. qty = NA

Sales. Qty = 90

Invoice. Qty = 90.

then I want to display the STATUS as "Completed or 1"

 

Condition 5

Quot. qty = NA

Sales. Qty = 90

Invoice. Qty = 80.

then I want to display the STATUS as "Not Completed or 0"

Regards,

Sam

entry.title: Re: 基于投资项目生成的在建工程固定资产科目
entry.content: Hi，我做了测试，配置了新的投资参数文件，这样就可以指向其他资产类别了。

entry.title: How to create attended bot in SAP Build Process Automation Cloud Studio?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Do we have any option to create attended bot in SAP Build Process Automation Cloud Studio? How to maintain the desktop agent to that?

Thanks in advance,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

SAP Build Process Automation #Attended Bot #Create

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting Data Collection in brief
entry.content:
Hi all;

We are implementing GRDC, and we have successfully configured our destinations in BTP and Cloudconnnector.

Currently, we are extracting data from ECC to S4Hana using the GRDC application. However, when scheduling the job in the Run Data mapping app, we encounter an issue where the dropdown menu for selecting the target instance in the traceability log is empty.  : please find screenshot for your reference 

Also, we are unable to download the traceability log for selected items or for all items, and similarly, our import logs are empty as well. I have attached a screenshot for your reference.

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Rajeshwaran

entry.title: Re: In-Depth With SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Series - Register Now!
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

the system tells me I am not eligible for this course. (I tried the "SAP Mobile Start & SAP Start Update - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" session.) Who is eligible for these courses?

Best

Carsten

entry.title: Re: reCAPTCHA with CAP and UI5
entry.content:
Hi @WouterLemaire,

great blog! We use a destination to in our app to store the siteKey and secret. I CAP we access it via the SAP Cloud SDKs getDestination function.

const destination = await getDestination(RECAPTCHA_DESTINATION_NAME)
const reCaptchaSiteKey = destination.originalProperties.siteKey
const reCaptchaSecret = destination.originalProperties.secret

 Kind regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud-2308_Income Tax Depreciation-India
entry.content: Hi Basha, did you get any solution for this issue?

Dear All,

Getting the below error while Possting Goods Issue to Production Order

entry.title: Re: Pick datetime Bugs
entry.content: Hi, @marihirvi , any update on this? thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - How to create a hierarchy in th...
entry.content:
@sraji2486 

When you get the dimension and measure view from data file, if you create dimension table for the dimension you will see option to create the hierrachy

 

 

If model is already created without generating the dimension tables, you can open the model and select the field and then click generate dimension table.

Then go click on the dimension and then you have option to add hierarchies on right hand pane.

 

 

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: 基于投资项目生成的在建工程固定资产科目
entry.content:
客户您好，

如果是您自定的的asset class 并且已经勾选了investment measure 的确是可以的 或者asset class 4001 和 4011 也是可以 在 SSCUI 104255 配置的，但是 asset class 4010是系统默认的配置无法更改选择investment measure，所以asset class 4010是不可以的。

Best Regards,

Evelyn

entry.title: Re: Conversion to SAP S/4HANA Finance - Training Available in SAP Enterprise Support
entry.content:
Dear @simonlarkham05 

 If they like to do greenfield, SAP S/4HANA Finance Fundamentals, it will provide delta capabilities in finance.

In the session Conversion of Accounting for SAP S/4HANA they could also attend day 1 and day 3 of this EGI as it highlights Asset Accounting and Material ledger. The actual conversion is done on day 2.

Please let us know if you have further questions.

Best regards, Silvia

entry.title: Re: 基于投资项目生成的在建工程固定资产科目
entry.content: 好的，谢谢。

entry.title: Re: Creating Dimension Filter Using Dropdown
entry.content:
@ahfadoo 

try console.log on select variable to see whether its an array of string or string and then check what data type parameter setdimensionfilter accepts.

entry.title: Re: Paramter Check in Db2 (db6)
entry.content:
Hi Joachim,

we decided to change the Db2 V11.5 parameter note 2751102. The note now requires
ACT_SORTMEM_LIMIT=100
and we added a comment that the value 100 and NONE are synonyms for this parameter.
This is in line with the IBM documentation and should solve your problem.

Regards

                 Frank

entry.title: 项目的工时表可以其他人替代填写或EXCEL导入吗
entry.content:
Hi，

我创建了项目，并在APP-管理项目需求的资源页签创建了资源需求，并在资源分配中将工作包分配了具体员工，例如张三。

我使用张三的账号登录系统，在APP-管理我的工时表，可以看到分配给他的工作包，并进行工时填报。

我的疑问是：

1）其他人可以帮张三进行工时填写吗？在哪个APP，或者这个项目经理有权限吗？

2）可以使用EXCEL批量导入工时报工吗？

Just to wanted to know, if there is any feasibility to get email notifications upon successful completion of job in Data Actions. If so, what are the steps to configure to get this email notifications.

Please find below the screenshot for the same.

Appreciate for Quick response. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to make Mandatory a Field
entry.content:
The Field that i want to make Mandatory is :

This field belongs to transaction VL31N and the name of this : Actual GR Date :

entry.title: Re: Link Asset to Project/WBS Element or Maintenance Order
entry.content:
Hello Rado,

AUC can be created/linked with WBS as soon as WBS is created. Same AUC can be inturn linked with final asset.

Check below blog for details. Hope this helps.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/auc-automatic-creation-from-wbs-s-4-hana/ba-p/13416770

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: SQL5137N error during System Rename
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

We are using DB2 on windows and doing System Rename. At the end of the stage we receive the error

I look at sapinst_dev and managed to get the root cause:

update dbm cfg using DIAGPATH \\ATSUGA\db2dumpBWD
SQL5137N The entry in the database manager configuration file for the
diagnostic directory path (diagpath) is invalid.

Please suggest to me how to resolve this error

Thank you

ZULFADZLY IQBAL

entry.title: Re: DMS storage category not filled and unable to edit wh...
entry.content:
Hi, 
from DMS application point of view there should be a pop-up raised to select the storage category when you mark the added original and then press the "Checkin" button. This pop-up should show all the storage categories maintained with document area "DMS" om transaction OACT.

Br

Christoph

entry.title: Re: Multiple target fields mapping at once | Standard iFl...
entry.content:
Hi Jwan,

Create the hashmaps and store the source fields and then create a graphical mapping, using a custom function i.e., get method you can map the the required fields from hashmap to their respective target fields.

You can refer the below blog: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/implementing-post-exit-of-installation-integration-flow-for-utilities/ba-p/13463407

Hope this helps you..

Regards,

Carol Pereira

entry.title: Re: Filter on ALV
entry.content: when the fieldcatalog-no_zero is set to X, the field is displayed without leading zeros, but in the filter you must input leading zeros; the other way around, if it is not set, the field is displayed with leading zeros, but in the filter you don't have to input leading zeros. very strange setting.

entry.title: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Craving to deploy your Cloud Foundry applications on Tomcat 10 runtime and make use of the latest and greatest Jakarta EE technologies? Got an app using Spring Boot and had to upgrade it to version 3.x due to Spring Boot 2.x EoL? Version 2.x of SAP BTP Security Services Integration Libraries is no longer sufficient as your applications require version 3.x? 

No more wait and fear! SAP Java Buildpack 2 is here!

 

NOTE:

  • This new major version of SAP Java Buildpack co-exists along with its older counterpart - from now on referred to as  SAP Java Buildpack 1 (SJB 1). 
  • For the time being, you can keep using SJB 1, but we highly recommend that you migrate your Java applications to SJB 2 at your earliest convenience. Deprecation plans for SJB 1 will be announced separately. 

Now, let's take a closer peek at the core features of SAP Java Buildpack 2:

  • The first release provides support for Java 17 (via SapMachine JRE 17). 
  • You can deploy Java applications on Tomcat 10.1.x. It implements Servlet 6.0, JSP 3.1, EL 5.0, WebSocket 2.1, and Authentication 3.0 specifications (the versions required by the Jakarta EE 10 platform).
  • You can use version 3.x of SAP BTP Security Services Integration Libraries. 
  • Our plans are to gradually add support for Java 21 as well as the latest version of the Apache TomEE runtime (adding support for even more Jakarta EE technologies). 

To use the new buildpack, refer to it in your manifest.yml or mtad.yml file, like this:

 

---
applications:
- name: <APP_NAME>
  buildpacks:
  - sap_java_buildpack_jakarta
  ...

 

Or specify it directly in the cf push command, like this:

 

cf push -f <PATH_TO_APP_MANIFEST> -b sap_java_buildpack_jakarta

 

To learn more, see the official documentation: SAP Java Buildpack 2
